title: Create an orchestration plan from customer demand
given: A user has org.orders edit and the tenant has at least one active CRM customer and product with inventory balances.
when: The user enters free-text demand, selects customer/product, and creates a plan in /assistant/order-orchestration.
then: An AssistantOrderOrchestrationPlan row stores source demand, match data, ATP evidence, and proposal JSON.
An AssistantAuditEvent records the plan summary and evidence.
No sales order, inventory allocation, reservation, or shipment is created silently.

title: Short ATP creates split or recovery proposal
given: The selected product has less available unheld inventory than requested demand.
then: The proposal marks splitRequired true and status NEEDS_APPROVAL.
Immediate and later quantities are shown in proposal lines.
The proposal states human approval is required before reservation, allocation, stock move, or split order creation.

title: Queue human approval for orchestration plan
given: A draft or promise-ready orchestration plan exists.
then: An AssistantActionQueueItem is created with actionKind approve_order_orchestration.
The plan status becomes APPROVAL_QUEUED and stores the action queue link.
An AssistantAuditEvent records the approval queue action without mutating inventory or shipments.
